---
title: "Component B"
---

> **Rename this page** to reflect the actual component (e.g., "Decoder", "Classifier Head", "Loss Module").

## Role and Responsibility

- **What it does**: [single-sentence description of the transformation performed]
- **Input**: shape, dtype, semantics — typically the output of Component A
- **Output**: shape, dtype, semantics — typically logits or structured predictions
- **Contract with Component A**: [describe interface dependency]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-comp-b-role
//| fig-cap: "Component B: data flow from Component A to output"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  CompA [label="Component A\noutput",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Op1   [label="Op 1"]
  Op2   [label="Op 2"]
  Logit [label="Logits\n[B × C]",       fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  CompA -> Op1 -> Op2 -> Logit
}
```

---

## Internal Structure

- **Projection**: maps from Component A's embedding space to output space
- **Head type**: [linear / MLP / attention] — justify with empirical or theoretical argument
- **Output activation**: [softmax for probabilities / none for logits passed to loss]
- **Calibration**: [e.g., temperature scaling applied at inference]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-comp-b-internals
//| fig-cap: "Component B internal structure"
//| fig-width: 6.5
//| fig-height: 3.2
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.55]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Emb [label="Embedding", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    Proj  [label="Projection"]
    Norm  [label="LayerNorm"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Logit [label="Logits", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
    Prob  [label="Probs",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  Emb -> Proj
  Emb -> Norm
  Proj -> Logit
  Norm -> Prob
}
```

---

## Key Design Decisions

- **Why not multi-layer head**: single linear layer reduces overfitting given [dataset size]
- **Loss function**: [e.g., CrossEntropyLoss for classification / MSE for regression] — handles class imbalance via [weights / focal]
- **Inference contract**: `predict_step` returns `{"pred": Tensor, "prob": Tensor, "meta": {...}}`

```{dot}
//| label: fig-comp-b-inference
//| fig-cap: "Inference output contract"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Model [label="LitModule",   fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Pred  [label="pred: Tensor", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  Prob  [label="prob: Tensor", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  Meta  [label="meta: dict",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Model -> Pred
  Model -> Prob
  Model -> Meta
}
```

---

## Configuration

Key parameters exposed through Hydra config:

| Parameter | Default | Range | Effect |
|-----------|---------|-------|--------|
| `output_dim` | auto | n_classes | output space size |
| `loss_weight` | None | [0, 1] per class | class-imbalance handling |
| `label_smoothing` | 0.0 | [0.0, 0.2] | regularisation via soft targets |

```bash
# Override example
python -m src.main method.label_smoothing=0.1
```
